name: Double Dark Chocolate Cake with White Chocolate Sauce
recipeIngredient: Semi-sweet chocolate, 10 1/2 Ounce (chopped in small pieces)
Unsweetened chocolate, 2 Ounce (chopped in small pieces)
White chocolate, 5 Ounce (chopped in small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch round cake pan by lining the bottom with wax paper or parchment and buttering it. Coat the pan with flour, tapping out excess.
3. Bring heavy cream to a boil in a 3-quart saucepan. Remove from heat and stir in both chocolates until smooth. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes. Stir until smooth. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine eggs, sugar, and vanilla over simmering water. Whisk constantly until hot for about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and beat on moderate speed, then high speed until the mixture triples in volume, cools, and is as thick as soft meringue (about 8 minutes).
5. With a whisk, stir one-third of the egg mixture into chocolate. Gently fold in the remainder with a rubber spatula until only a few chocolate streaks remain. Pour batter into prepared pan and smooth top.
6. Carefully pour boiling water halfway up the sides of the pan. Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Let cool 30 minutes in water, then remove and place on rack to cool completely.
7. Invert onto serving dish and gently remove paper.
8. For frosting, combine chocolate and butter over simmering water until melted. Remove from heat and let cool for 10 minutes. Add bourbon and stir; whisk in egg yolks one at a time.
9. Beat egg whites to form soft peaks. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff peaks form (about 2 minutes). Fold one-quarter of mixture into chocolate and blend well. Fold in remaining whites with rubber spatula until barely incorporated. Chill for at least 2 hours.
10. For sauce, melt white chocolate over simmering water. Add cream and stir for a minute. Cool to room temperature. The sauce can be chilled slightly to blend before serving.
11. Assemble cake by scooping frosting into pastry tube fitted with wide (Number 4) star tube. Pipe over top of cake. Chill up to 2 days.
12. Serve cake at room temperature, stirring sauce as needed. Pour small pool onto each plate and place a slice of cake on top.
